calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Leahy, via ZOOM, for Vinod Koduri, Administrator; Jeff Coons, via ZOOM, for Sowmya Reddy, Heir.

Mr. Leahy reports that upon decedent's death, his client had two options, to continue paying the mortgage on the Virginia property or not make payments and risk losing the property to foreclosure and that there was no intent to make distributions. The court reminds Mr. Leahy that he likely had a third option which was to contact counsel in Virginia. Mr. Leahy reports that he did contact counsel in Virginia for their opinion and once the process began, the property was transferred to the heir. Mr. Coons offers oral testimony to support his client's position and agrees with Mr. Leahy's position. Mr. Leahy advises the court that he has complied with the court's request to transfer estate funds to additional financial institutions to comply with the FDIC limit.

After additional discussion, the Second Amended First and Final Accounting, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-16-2021 Continued To Nov-09-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Leahy, via ZOOM, for Vinod Koduri, Administrator; Jeff Coons, via ZOOM, for Sowmya Reddy, Heir.

The court begins by questioning Mr. Leahy's neglect in addressing the Examiner's notes regarding failure to insure funds as required by statute. Mr. Leahy reports that he misunderstood the Examiner's notes as a request to submit proof of investments. The court then advises Mr. Leahy as to the Administrator's breach of duties specifically, making preliminary cash distributions and payment of attorney fees to the Virginia probate attorney without prior court approval. Mr. Leahy provides additional oral testimony to address the court's concerns. The court reminds Mr. Leahy that any distributions require prior court approval and order thereon. The court advises counsel that it will be reviewing the proposed order with the Examiner and instructs Mr. Leahy to not move any funds until the court has issued its order.

The Accounting petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

***After additonal consideration by the court, the Accunting petition is continued to Nov-09-2021 for hearing. See order issued by the court on Sep-17-2021.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-17-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-22-2021 Continued To May-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Leahy appeared by zoom for Vinod Koduri (Administrator).
Adam Lazar appeared by zoom for Sowmya Reddy (Surviving Spouse).

Mr. Leahy stated that they have been making progress, that there were delays regarding Mr. Lazar doing work on Proposition 19, that he delivered a draft of the accounting to Mr. Lazar and that they are negotiating. Mr. Lazar stated that he has received a response to his objections to the accounting, and that he is not ready to sign off on the accounting, but they appear to be closer. Status on close of estate is continued to May 17, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Leahy is to have either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration on file by May 5, 2021.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-01-2021 Continued To Mar-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Leahy appeared by zoom for Vinod Koduri (Administrator).
Adam Lazar appeared by zoom for Sonia Reddy (Surviving Spouse).

Mr. Leahy stated that they have made a lot of progress since the last hearing, that the bond was filed, that a draft accounting and a proposed distribution has been rendered by the Administrator, and that it has been passed along to Mr. Lazar. Mr. Lazar stated that he is in the process of reviewing and preparing a response to the accounting. The Court informed Counsel that it usually requires filing of a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of a report on status of administration, but it will overlook this in light of the progress that is being made. Status on close of estate is continued to March 22, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Increased Bond
Off Calendar Jan-04-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Continued To Feb-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Leahy appeared by zoom for Vinod Koduri (Administrator).
Adam Lazar appeared by zoom for Sowmya Reddy (surviving Spouse).

The Court stated that it reviewed the status report, but it is looking for a petition for additional time to administer the estate. Mr. Leahy stated that he was a little confused. The Court explained that there is a time frame for filing of a petition for final distribution and if it can't be done within that time frame, it requires filing of a petition to seek additional time to administer the estate. Mr. Leahy stated that he is working on the accounting, that there was some litigation, that the dispute was over the nature of the assets and that they were able to come to a resolution. Mr. Leahy also requested a 120-day continuance stating that he is hoping to have a petition on file by then. Mr. Lazar stated that they filed a settlement in February, that they are still concerned, and that it is nine months later and there still is no movement. Mr. Lazar also stated that the settlement agreement required that the Petitioner increase the bond, that it too took nine months, that the current bond is for $10,000.00 and that the proper amount should be $758,000.00. Mr. Leahy stated that it is his understanding that the bond was approved, that the order was filed on December 3rd, that the bond is still in progress and that the bond is with Mr. Fazio (Bonding Agent). The Court stated that given the amount involved, it would like to see this laced up. Mr. Lazar stated that the parties believed they had settled these issues in February and that they would like to see an expeditious resolution. Status on filing of the increased bond is set for January 4, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is continued to February 1, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
